programs.title: Rooster
programs.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programs.title: Comeback 3
programs.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programs.title: Blue Moon
programs.desc: The year is 1943. The legendary lyricist Lorenz Hart (Ethan Hawke), co-author of such hits as "Blue Moon" and "My Funny Valentine", spends the night from March 31 to April 1 in Sardi's bar.In the company of friends, including his muse Elizabeth Weiland (Margaret Qualley), he struggles with wounded pride and shaken self-confidence.At this time, his former long-time collaborator Richard Rodgers (Andrew Scott) celebrates the premiere of his musical entitled"Oklahoma!", which he wrote with Oscar Hammerstein II (Simon Delaney).Two Oscar nominations.

programs.title: Eine Million Minuten
programs.desc: Spouses Vera (Karoline Herfurth) and Wolf (Tom Schilling) Küper, parents of Nina (Pola Friedrichs) and Simon (Piet Levi Busch), have difficulty dividing their time between work and household duties.The bond that united them years ago is weakening.Wolf focuses on his professional career, and Vera, confined to her four walls, is fed up with loneliness and having to replace her children's fathers.The family's world is ruined by the daughter's disastrous medical diagnosis.Wolf recalls that the girl's greatest wish was to spend a million minutes solely on pleasure.The Küpers decide to make her dream come true.Together they set off on a lifelong journey that leads through exotic regions of the world.They get to know new places and foreign cultures, and decide what their future will look like.

programs.title: One to One: John & Yoko
programs.desc: The story of a famous couple of artists, focusing on the One to One charity concert that took place at Madison Square Garden on August 30, 1972.From 1971, John Lennon and Yoko Ono lived in New York, in Greenwich Village, for 18 months.Their then apartment was reconstructed for the film.Private film, photo and music archives of artists and friends were also used, as well as FBI tapes to show their fate and the company they kept in: from Allen Ginsberg to Jerry Rubin and activist AJ Weberman.

actor: Themselves - The Plastic Ono Elephants Memory Band

programs.title: Elysium
programs.desc: The year is 2154. Los Angeles resembles a landfill.People are struggling to survive on a devastated Earth, full of violence and poverty.Rich people live on the Elysium space station.Among the technologies available to them are medical capsules that cure diseases.One day, Max Da Costa, who lives in the slums, is heavily irradiated as a result of an accident at a factory.The dose is lethal.He has five days left.He realizes that only the capsule can save him.So he visits the smuggler Spider, hoping that thanks to him he will get to Elysium.The man promises help on the condition that he will kidnap the wealthy Carlyle for him.The dying Da Costa's body is enhanced with new technology.He soon comes into possession of secret information that could destroy the current order.
